name: Southern Swing Golf Club
address: 720 Hall of Fame Dr, Knoxville, TN 37921
about: Southern Swing Golf Club is a private indoor golf venue located in Knoxville, Tennessee. The facility offers an immersive golf experience using technology from Foresight and PuttView, providing members with precision practice, short-game mastery, and social play opportunities. As a membership-based club, it operates with keyless entry and an app-based booking system for reserving simulator bays and lessons. The club is designed to provide a country club atmosphere with amenities including a lounge and market, and it hosts leagues, tournaments, and private events. It is positioned as a premium indoor golf experience suitable for both serious practice and social rounds.
why_golfers_like_it: Elite Foresight and PuttView technology for precise tracking and simulation
Unlimited simulator access for members with 2-week advance booking
Professional coaching from a former collegiate and PGA-level golfer
BYOB policy and a full-service lounge market for socializing

food_and_drink.notes: On-site market and lounge available to members and guests
BYOB friendly policy, no alcohol served on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor technology powering the simulators
Putting technology integrated for short game practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if rental clubs are provided, but it is assumed members and guests must bring their own clubs for use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the club has a BYOB policy, allowing members and guests to bring their own alcohol. An on-site market and lounge are also available for food.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact duration for an 18-hole simulator round, but it mentions 'on your schedule' booking, implying flexibility.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information on whether children are allowed or if there are kid-specific amenities. Contact the venue for details on family policies.
